case_title: JUAN LIMON SR VS. FAKHRY AWAR AKA SWEISS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIMON SR, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT AWAR AKA SWEISS, FAKHRY AWAR AKA SWEISS, EDITH ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON CLAIM AND CROSS-CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIMON SR, JUAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AWAR AKA SWEISS, FAKHRY AWAR AKA SWEISS, EDITH ANN PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLETE THE JOB FOR WHICH HE WAS HIRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY LIMON SR, JUAN AWAR AKA SWEISS, FAKHRY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO BOTH DEFENDANTS.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AWAR AKA SWEISS, FAKHRY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LIMON SR, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON CLAIM AND CROSS-CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AWAR AKA SWEISS, FAKHRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LIMON SR, JUAN PARTIES HAVE WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS ON CROSS-CLAIM. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF IS LIABLE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
